Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets analyze the event log data to identify anomalies in the business process flow for order management Ill systematically go through each case to spot deviations from the expected process flow

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Based on the assumed normal process flow 1 Register Order Sales 2 Perform Credit Check Finance 3 Validate Stock Warehouse 4 Confirm Shipment Logistics 5 Ship Goods Logistics 6 Issue Invoice Finance 7 Receive Payment Finance

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1001 Follows the correct order Register Order Credit Check Validate Stock Confirm Shipment Ship Goods Issue Invoice Receive Payment Status Normal process flow

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 Register Order event 8 Confirm Shipment event 9 Anomaly Shipment confirmed before credit check Ship Goods event 10 Perform Credit Check event 11 Anomaly Credit check done after shipment Validate Stock event 12 Anomaly Stock validation done after shipping Issue Invoice event 13 Receive Payment event 14

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This case has multiple anomalies with activities happening out of order

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 Register Order event 15 Perform Credit Check event 16 Ship Goods event 17 Anomaly Shipping before Validate Stock and Confirm Shipment Issue Invoice event 18 Confirm Shipment event 19 Anomaly Shipment confirmed after shipping Receive Payment event 20

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 Register Order event 21 Receive Payment event 22 Anomaly Payment received before any shipping or invoicing Issue Invoice event 23 Anomaly Invoice issued after payment received Confirm Shipment event 24 Ship Goods event 25

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Several anomalies with payment and invoicing happening before shipping

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Key anomalies identified 1 Activities happening in wrong order credit check after shipment stock validation after shipping 2 Payment received before invoice and shipping 3 Invoice issued after payment received 4 Shipment confirmed after goods already shipped

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Now Ill formulate SQL queries to investigate these anomalies systematically
